#### Summary

**The vast majority (93%) of dihydrofolate reductase variants generated by saturation mutagenesis at three important amino acids were fully inactive** [^papkou2023].

#### See also

* [[The majority of missense mutations are destabilizing]]
* [[Evolution and natural selection]]

[^papkou2023]: Papkou et al. (2023) "A rugged yet easily navigable fitness landscape." *Science*. https://doi.org/10.1126/science.adh3860
